name: sceneworks
description: Local AI image and video generation studio runtime skeleton.

scripts.rust:check: npm run rust:fmt && npm run rust:lint && npm run rust:test && npm run rust:build
scripts.api:build:embedded: npm run web:build && cargo build -p sceneworks-rust-api --release --features embed-web
scripts.api:build:embedded:candle: npm run web:build && cargo build -p sceneworks-rust-api --release --features embed-web,backend-candle
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && git add apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json apps/desktop/package.json apps/desktop/package-lock.json apps/web/package.json apps/web/package-lock.json
